title: Add test coverage for tool call parsers and fix edge cases
Add diagnostic logging and production hardening for tool call repair
notes: COMPLETED: Added tool_stream=true for GLM 5.1 in rewriteVllmPayload, replaced Date.now()+Math.random() IDs with crypto.randomUUID(), added early-return guard in parseToolCallsFromText, added console.warn diagnostic logging (3 parsers) and console.debug empty-result logging (4 sites)
close_reason: All 4 changes verified via grep: randomUUID import+usage, tool_stream assignment, 3x console.warn + 4x console.debug, early-return guard. Project has no build/check steps.
